cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what can be inferred from the passage. The options are A, B, C, D. First, I need to check what the passage says about the Sacagawea Golden Dollar and the new Presidential $1 coins. The relevant part is in the third paragraph. It says, "The Presidential $1 coins will be the same size and color as the Sacagawea Golden Dollar. However, there is an important difference. For the first time since the 1930s, there is an inscription on the edge of each coin." So the new coins have the same size and color as the Sacagawea Golden Dollar. So the new coins are gold-colored. The question options are about the color. Option C says "the new coin takes on a white color," which is incorrect because the passage says they are gold-colored. So C is wrong.
